App initialization flow:

runFlavoredApp(startupConfig: StartupConfig.dev());
within guarder zone:
	(WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized())
	FlutterNativeSplash.preserve(widgetsBinding: widgetsBinding);
	await Firebase.initializeApp(options: startupConfig.firebaseOptions);
	await configureDependencies(Environment(startupConfig.flavor.name));
	runApp(AppRoot(): Controlled by AppBloc)
		Fire AppInitializationRequested event:
			await _appInitializerService.initializeAppComponents();
				await _crashlyticsService.initialize();
			    await _analyticsService.initialize();
			    await _appDatabase.initialize();
			await _sessionInitializerService.initializeSessionComponents();
				await _analyticsService.setSessionData(...user-id and other session data...)
				await _crashlyticsService.setSessionData(...user-id and other session data...)
			Fire _ListenLocaleChangeRequested event: Starts listening for _appPreferenceService.getLocaleStream() and emit AppInitializationSuccess with new locale.
			Fire _ListenThemeModeChangeRequested event: Starts listening for _appPreferenceService.getThemeModeStream() and emit AppInitializationSuccess with new themeMode.
			Finally emit AppInitializationSuccess with current locale and theme-mode (from preferences).
	FlutterNativeSplash.remove();
